name: training_observation
description: Canonical contract for SDM training rows used by encoder + PU head training.

notes.feature_vectors: Feature vectors are dense and fixed-order per feature_version. Catalog-backed numeric columns are grouped into bioclimate, landclass, terrain, edaphic, and temporal vectors. Uncatalogued numeric observation columns are retained in other_features.
notes.feature_role: input columns are allowed in model tensors; metadata columns are retained for joins, splits, auditing, and calibration only.
notes.partitioning: Datasets are partitioned only by split. year_month and region_id remain metadata columns for sampling, analysis, and leakage checks.
notes.sampling_semantics: For PU runs, generated unlabeled/background rows are sampled from other-species positive rows within the same split. Candidate rows that conflict with target-species positives on (cell_id, year_month) are excluded. Generated rows keep unlabeled semantics (presence_label=0) and are not treated as true negatives.

columns.name: sample_id
columns.description: Globally unique row id (observation or background sample).

columns.name: observation_id
columns.description: Original occurrence id; null for generated background rows.

columns.name: species_key
columns.description: Species identifier used by per-species heads.

columns.name: presence_label
columns.description: 1 for positive, 0 for unlabeled/background sample.

columns.name: sample_weight
columns.description: Row weight for PU learning / sampling correction.

columns.name: cell_id
columns.description: Spatial index cell id used to join environmental context.

columns.name: region_id
columns.description: Region/biome identifier retained for stratified analysis and sampling.

columns.name: lat
columns.description: Latitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

columns.name: lon
columns.description: Longitude in WGS84 decimal degrees.

columns.name: event_time_utc
columns.description: Observation/background timestamp in UTC used for weather alignment.

columns.name: year_month
columns.description: YYYY-MM value derived from event_time_utc.

columns.name: split
columns.description: Dataset split label (train/val/test) from spatiotemporal splitter.

columns.name: source
columns.description: Data source tag (e.g., gbif, inat, generated_background).

columns.name: feature_version
columns.description: Version of feature engineering order and normalization.

columns.name: bioclimate_features
columns.description: Dense feature vector for catalog bioclimate layers observed in the source data.

columns.name: bioclimate_missing_mask
columns.description: Missingness mask aligned to bioclimate_features (1=missing, 0=observed).

columns.name: landclass_features
columns.description: Dense feature vector for catalog landclass layers observed in the source data.

columns.name: landclass_missing_mask
columns.description: Missingness mask aligned to landclass_features (1=missing, 0=observed).

columns.name: terrain_features
columns.description: Dense feature vector for catalog terrain layers observed in the source data.

columns.name: terrain_missing_mask
columns.description: Missingness mask aligned to terrain_features (1=missing, 0=observed).

columns.name: edaphic_features
columns.description: Dense feature vector for catalog edaphic layers observed in the source data.

columns.name: edaphic_missing_mask
columns.description: Missingness mask aligned to edaphic_features (1=missing, 0=observed).

columns.name: temporal_features
columns.description: Dense feature vector for catalog temporal layers observed in the source data.

columns.name: temporal_missing_mask
columns.description: Missingness mask aligned to temporal_features (1=missing, 0=observed).

columns.name: other_features
columns.description: Dense feature vector for uncatalogued numeric observation columns retained from source occurrence parquet files.

columns.name: other_missing_mask
columns.description: Missingness mask aligned to other_features (1=missing, 0=observed).
